name: rm-assets
description: Prepare visual source assets for a Remotion composition and stage them where staticFile() resolves. Cuts the background out of a subject/product/logo image via ai-gen (fal-ai/bria/background/remove) into a transparent cutout, and ingests a brand site/screen (hyperframes capture, or the runtime Chrome Headless Shell as a fallback) into screenshots + extracted design tokens. Writes cutouts to assets/cutouts/ AND stages a copy into remotion-project/public/cutouts/; writes capture frames into remotion-project/public/captures/[slug]/ (staticFile-reachable) and design tokens into assets/captures/[slug]/extracted/. Use during the asset-prep phase (phase 4, alongside rm-voiceover) before rm-build, whenever the storyboard calls for a subject cutout/matte, a product shot on transparency, or captured brand frames. Local and keyless (ai-gen via the SL8 proxy; capture via the runtime Chrome) — no HeyGen, no cloud, no auth. It does NOT author or render the composition (that is rm-build / rm-render) — no rendering here.

inputs.name: source-image
inputs.description: A readable PNG/JPG/WebP to background-remove (a subject, product shot, or logo). Required for a cutout; omit if only capturing.

inputs.name: capture-url
inputs.description: A website/brand/screen URL to ingest into the project's public/ frames. Required for a capture; omit if only cutting out.

inputs.name: project
inputs.description: The active project slug — outputs land under artifacts/[project-name]/. From state.md/context.md, never invented.

inputs.name: out-name
inputs.description: Output stem for a cutout (cutouts/[out-name].png) or folder slug for a capture (captures/[slug]/). Default = the source image basename / the URL host.

outputs.name: cutout
outputs.description: Canonical transparent-background matte (RGBA PNG) of the subject/product/logo.

outputs.name: cutout-staged
outputs.description: The same matte staged under public/ so the composition reaches it via staticFile("cutouts/[out-name].png").

outputs.name: capture-frames
outputs.description: Captured brand frames (scroll-NNN.png + contact-sheet.jpg) + any downloaded site assets, staticFile-reachable as staticFile("captures/[slug]/[file].png").

outputs.name: capture-tokens
outputs.description: Extracted design tokens (tokens.json palette/fonts/headings, design-styles.json, fonts-manifest.json, visible-text.txt, page.html) — metadata for rm-build / rm-brand-extract, not a render asset.
